title: taraxacum grandiflorum
intro: Taraxacum grandiflorum, also known as the large-flowered dandelion, is a plant species within the dandelion genus. It is a flowering plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, due to its high content of vitamins A, C, and K, as well as minerals like potassium and iron. Taraxacum grandiflorum is often prepared as an herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in salads and as a coffee substitute in some parts of the world.
